# Ts Game Toolbox

A collection of reusable functions and classes for Games or Programs developed in Javascript/Typescript.

## Main
- [Overview](README.md): Basic overview and coordinate system information.
- [AI Documentation Context](docs/ai.md): Consolidated documentation optimized for LLMs and AI agents.
- [Handover Guide](docs/handover.md): Instructions for sharing this library with other agents.
- [Assets](docs/assets.md): Asset loading and management.
- [Geometries](docs/geometries.md): Vector2, Rect, and other geometric primitives.
- [Signals](docs/signals.md): Event and Signal sockets.
- [Flow](docs/flow.md): Progress tracking and async utilities.
- [UI](docs/ui.md): Canvas-based UI system.
- [Physics](docs/physics.md): Sweeping SAT implementation (WIP).

## Optional
- [Miscellaneous](docs/misc.md): Colors, math helpers, and internal testing tools.
- [Trees](docs/trees.md): QuadTree and Collections.
